close_reason: Positive observation: ENV_LOCK documentation is good
description: src/lib.rs:331-340 introduces a static Mutex to serialize tests that read/write BWS_ACCESS_TOKEN and explicitly documents the limitation: it only coordinates threads inside this test binary, not across cargo's parallel test-binary execution. The comment also points at a future fix (per-process lock file) if cross-crate coordination is needed. This is exactly the right way to document a known-narrow synchronization primitive.
title: Good: ENV_LOCK Mutex documented with scope limitation
